creator: bsdkaffee@gmail.com
text:
New port: finance/kmymoney-kde4
This is the KDE4 version of finance/kmymoney2
http://kmymoney2.sourceforge.net/index-home.html

How-To-Repeat: Use attached shar.
KBANKING option requires:
- Latest devel/gwenhywfar (see ports/144518)
- Latest finance/aqbanking (see ports/144519) (compiled with QT4 option)
